perspectives.name: Cost Overrun Hawk
perspectives.question: Are construction costs spiraling beyond contingency?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Budget-to-actual variance exceeds 5% of GMP OR contingency utilization exceeds 60% with more than 40% of construction remaining OR change order velocity exceeds 3 COs per month for 3 consecutive months

perspectives.name: Absorption Skeptic
perspectives.question: Will this project actually lease up on the pro forma timeline?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Absorption velocity below 80% of pro forma rate for 8+ consecutive weeks OR competitive supply delivering within 12 months exceeds 2x submarket annual absorption OR concession budget projected to be exhausted before 80% occupancy

perspectives.name: Construction Risk
perspectives.question: Is the GC/schedule/quality on track or heading for a claim?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Schedule Performance Index (SPI) below 0.90 for 2 consecutive months OR open RFIs exceed 50 with average age above 21 days OR safety TRIR exceeds 4.0 OR GC requesting time extension exceeding 60 days

perspectives.name: Entitlement Bear
perspectives.question: Will this project actually get approved?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: NIMBY composite score exceeds 65 OR entitlement pathway requires rezoning in jurisdiction with less than 50% rezoning approval rate OR entitlement timeline exceeds 18 months OR impact fees exceed 5% of total development cost

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs. Cost Overrun Hawk and Absorption Skeptic perspectives carry veto weight on STABILIZED verdicts. Entitlement Bear carries veto weight on phase 1 PASS verdicts.
